turns.q: My discount code isn't applying at checkout — what are the usual reasons?
turns.replyTail:
asons are: the order is under $60, the code is tied to a different email than the one used at signup, or the items in the cart are excluded. Promo codes also do not stack, and welcome codes are usually in the second welcome email, sometimes in Gmail's Promotions tab or sent to either email or SMS if you signed up for both. If you want to use the welcome code, make sure you're signed in with the same email and your subtotal is at least $60. Ready to try it again and complete your order?

We do not ship internationally. We only ship within the U.S., and we also do not ship to PO Boxes, APO/FPO addresses, or correctional facilities. If you're shipping within the continental U.S., standard shipping is free, so you can shop without extra delivery cost. Ready to pick out your order?
